General.Name: Viking Mines Ltd
General.Description: Viking Mines Limited operates as a mineral exploration company in Australia. The company explores for vanadium, nickel, copper, cobalt, and gold deposits. It holds 100% in the Canegrass Battery Minerals project that covers 620 kilometers located in the Murchison region, north-east Perth, Western Australia; and the Riverina East Gold project located in Eastern Goldfields of Western Australia. The company was formerly known as Viking Ashanti Limited. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
General.Address: 15-17 Old Aberdeen Place, West Perth, WA, Australia, 6005
